text:
during installation it successfully boots to UserConfig. Using
the visual interface i disable everything that shows up except the keyboard. exit/save. boot continues then within a fraction of second
the screen goes black and the machine is dead. 
I'm not very experienced with freebsd I don't know where to go from there.

How-To-Repeat: try to install 4.0 or 4.1 on an LXe PRO
